title: Pension Investment 2024 - Select Topics
content:
## Pension Investment 2024 - Select Topics
McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to invite you to join us for a webinar presentation as we delve into select investment topics of interest to pension investors. Our panel of experts will provide valuable insight into the practical application of pension investment regulations and duties for plan administrators on our listed topics.
Discussion topics include:
- Considerations for RPP Investment in New Asset Classes
- Commentary on Federal Fall Economic Statement (2023) item seeking to increase domestic investments and international analogues
- Preparing for the Black Swan: Practical Primer on Updated Pension Borrowing Rules
Speakers: Scott W. Bell , Kelleher Lynch , Stefanie Morand , Gregory Winfield
Note: This presentation will be given in English only. All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event.
This program qualifies for up to 1.5 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec.
For questions about this seminar, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
12:00 p.m. – 1:30 p.m. (ET) 10:00 a.m. – 11:30 a.m. (MT) 9:00 a.m. – 10:30 a.m. (PT)
